validation.approved_by: DELIVER orchestrator — decomposition matches distill Phase 02 scope + ADR-026 §Decision outcome item 1

roadmap.scope_note: Phase 02 only (MR-2). Phase 01 already on main (21fda79 + a07777a). Phases 03-05 ship on later crew clones.

phases.name: MR-2 dbt intermediate ibis-source plugin (replaces post-render regex)
phases.description: Replace post-render sql.replace dbt-ref regex with an ibis-native rendering path (custom DuckDBCompiler subclass). Characterization tests first per CLAUDE.md brownfield discipline.

steps.name: Characterization tests for dbt-ref macro emission
steps.scenario: characterization of current byte-faithful dbt-ref macro output
steps.criteria: New characterization module pins byte-faithful dbt-ref output for both post-render sites: _rewrite_sources_to_dbt_refs in sql_generator.py and the sql.replace regex in intermediate.py; Parameterized cases cover dataset-source stg_ prefix, view-source int_ prefix, mixed sources, name snake-casing, and structured-columns ref_mode=True path; All new tests pass against HEAD with no production code change in this step; Backend test gate ./tools/test/test.sh --backend stays GREEN with 1319+ tests passing; Commit follows Conventional Commits and includes Step-ID: 02-01 git trailer
steps.implementation_notes: READ FIRST: sql_generator.py lines 91-189 (ViewIbisCompiler) and 372-389 (_rewrite_sources_to_dbt_refs); intermediate.py whole file; existing test_intermediate.py for the legacy-path patterns. Build View instances via the Phase 01 Pydantic surface (see backend/app/models/view.py). Snake rule: name.lower().replace(' ','_'); prefix int_ for view refs, stg_ for dataset refs. Walking-skeleton acceptance suite needs compose stack — not required for this step's local gate; the backend gate suffices.

steps.name: Ibis-source plugin replaces post-render dbt-ref regex
steps.scenario: ibis-source plugin emits dbt-ref macros byte-faithfully
steps.scenario_name: byte-faithful equivalence between legacy regex and new plugin
steps.criteria: New module backend/app/use_cases/project/_dbt/ibis_dbt_source.py contains custom DuckDBCompiler subclass emitting dbt-ref macros directly during ibis compilation; _rewrite_sources_to_dbt_refs deleted from sql_generator.py and ViewIbisCompiler ref_mode=True delegates to the new plugin; intermediate.py contains zero sql.replace calls verified by grep — regex round-trip retired; Characterization tests from step 02-01 pass unchanged — byte-faithful equivalence preserved; Backend test gate green and commit references ADR-026 MR-2 with Step-ID: 02-02 git trailer
steps.implementation_notes: Ibis 9.5.0 installed. Extension point: from ibis.backends.sql.compilers.duckdb import DuckDBCompiler. Subclass it and override visit_DatabaseTable + visit_UnboundTable to emit {{ ref('<dbt_model_name>') }} via a sqlglot AST node whose .sql() returns the macro string (sqlglot.exp.Identifier with quoted=False also works). Compiler instance takes ref_name_map + ref_type_map at construction. ViewIbisCompiler.generate_executable(view, ref_mode=True) constructs the plugin compiler from view.source_refs and renders via compiler.translate(table).sql(dialect='duckdb'). For intermediate.py else-branch (legacy view.sql_definition path): pragmatic choice — retire the branch and update or delete legacy-path tests in test_intermediate.py with rationale, OR keep but route through plugin via sqlglot parsing. PROHIBITED per DWD-4: sqlglot post-hoc AST validation, .replace("'","''") defenses, any new post-render regex anywhere.

exit_criteria_phase_02: Walking-skeleton + milestone-1 still GREEN (compose-stack acceptance suite)
Characterization tests added for the ibis-source plugin (brownfield discipline)
Reviewer approves: dbt-macro shape is byte-faithful for cases the legacy regex covers
